{
  "to": "Rituraj Shrivastava <rituraj@leewayhertz.com>",
  "subject": "RE: Hold release requested on PO-LH-Q2-1714 - wire transfer cleared, please release",
  "body": "Hi Rituraj,

Thank you for the update. We have initiated the credit-hold release request for your PO PO-LH-Q2-1714.

In our system, PO PO-LH-Q2-1714 is currently on Salesforce Order <REDACTED_PHONE_10> with status “Draft” (EffectiveDate: 2026-04-12). We are validating the payment clearance details you referenced (wire value date 2026-06-12; USD 21,485; clearance reference: WIRE-LH-<REDACTED_PHONE_3>) and will release the credit hold as soon as the clearance is confirmed.

This request is being tracked under Case <REDACTED_PHONE_13> (Subject: hold_release).

If you can reply with the wire confirmation / payment-proof worksheet (or the bank UTR/reference and remittance advice), we can complete the verification faster.

Regards,
Keysight Sales Operations"
}
